chief_complaint: A 47-year-old man presented with sudden chest pain. Acute coronary syndrome was suspected based on symptom and elevated troponin I levels.
history: The patient presented with sudden chest pain. His past medical history, medications, and social history are not provided.
exam: No specific physical examination findings are mentioned.
labs: Elevated troponin I levels. Coronary angiography revealed diffuse coronary artery ectasia and total occlusion of mid-left circumflex artery.
